overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in medieval robes exploring a snowy fantasy village at night. The character walks through a wooden gate, passes benches and a central well, and approaches a timber-framed building entrance, with warm lantern light contrasting against the blue winter night and snow-covered mountains in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy village square with wooden fences and stone benches

events.description: character passes through wooden gate into open village square
slight left turn to navigate around stone bench

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snowy village square, passing wooden benches and fences while heading toward the village center

entered.detail: tall wooden gate with vertical slats and lantern post, partially open
snow-topped wooden fence lining the village square
snow-covered stone bench with wooden supports
cast iron street lamp with warm orange glow illuminating the snow
snow-covered mountain peaks visible against dark blue night sky

segments.scene_description: The character begins at a wooden gate and walks into a wide snowy village square. Warm lantern light illuminates the snow-covered ground as the character passes wooden benches and fences, with mountains visible in the background under a clear night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path with covered well and timber houses

events.description: approaching the central wooden well structure with overhead beam

agents.ego_description: continuing along the snowy path toward the village well, passing between timber-framed houses and stone walls

entered.detail: covered wooden well with overhead beam and chain mechanism, snow dusted
low stone wall covered in snow and vegetation
dark timber-framed house with glowing windows
tall wooden frame structure with angled beam

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as the character approaches a wooden well surrounded by stone walls. Snow-covered trees and timber-framed houses line the route, with the previous open square giving way to a more enclosed village path beneath partially visible sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance with wooden stairs and porch

events.description: dog appears sitting in the snow near the path
character begins ascending wooden stairs to building entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the building entrance, passing a dog on the left, and climbing the wooden stairs toward the lit doorway

notable_agents.action: dog sitting in the snow near the path, watching the character approach

entered.detail: snow-dusted wooden stairs leading up to building entrance
wooden porch with lit wall-mounted lantern and open doorway
warmly lit window of the timber house

segments.scene_description: A dog appears near the path as the character approaches a wooden building. The character walks up snow-covered wooden stairs toward a warmly lit entrance, transitioning from the open village to the sheltered porch area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, open village square into the sheltered entrance of a timber-framed building. It begins at a wooden gate, moving across a snowy expanse illuminated by warm lantern light with distant mountains framing the clear night sky. As the character advances, the open square narrows into a more enclosed path lined with snow-covered trees and houses, passing a stone-walled wooden well. The scene then shifts toward a wooden building where a dog appears by the path, before finally ascending snow-covered stairs toward a warmly lit porch.
